content.body:
- init: creates new flat layout (memory/, constraints/, skills/, logs/,
  telemetry/) — no kb/ wrapper ever created
- upgrade: Phase 0 detects legacy .leo/kb/ and migrates to flat layout;
  idempotent; partial-migration conflicts reported and skipped safely
- All read/write paths updated: storage adapter, doctor, status, reindex,
  validate, export, import, update, runtime content generator
- update command accepts both new (memory/) and legacy (kb/docs/) core
  source layouts for backward compatibility
- Tests updated throughout; four new tests: MigratesKBLayout,
  MigrationIdempotent, PartialMigrationSkipsExisting, NewLayout_NoKBDir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): update all code paths + add layout migration to leo upgrade
content.summary:
